overview: A production-ready, VS Code-inspired web IDE with Monaco Editor, file tree with localStorage persistence, multi-tab editing, syntax highlighting, dark theme, a polished mock chat panel, command palette, and a professional desktop IDE experience.
features: Monaco Editor with syntax highlighting, code folding, minimap, and bracket matching
File tree with create/rename/delete, file icons by type, and localStorage persistence
Multi-tab editor with unsaved change indicators and keyboard shortcuts
VS Code-inspired dark theme with activity bar, status bar, and breadcrumb navigation
Mock chat panel with typing indicators, message history, and localStorage persistence
Command palette (Ctrl+Shift+P) and Quick Open (Ctrl+P) with fuzzy search
Full menu bar: File, Edit, View, Help menus with all standard actions
Settings panel with font, theme, and editor preferences persisted to localStorage
